title: senecio glaucus subsp. coronopifolius
intro: Senecio glaucus subsp. coronopifolius, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Woolly Groundsel include the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
